ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the song was released */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Unique prefix for the song identifier */,
  "chart_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song on the chart */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the song */,
  "high_chart" INTEGER /* Highest chart position achieved by the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyricist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lyricist */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the composer */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the song in minutes and seconds */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact date the song was released */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is a single */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist or their management */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist typically performs */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "active_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist started their career */,
  "active_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist retired or ended their career */,
  "management_company" TEXT /* Name of the management company */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g., Billboard Hot 100) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart and its significance */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the chart is based */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the chart (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the chart started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the chart ended (if applicable) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the chart's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist performing */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the performance took place */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the performance */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Average ticket price for the performance */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the venue */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, festival) */,
  "is_live_streamed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the performance was live-streamed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result (e.g., Won, Nominated) */,
  "ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "award_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award category */,
  "ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "presenter" TEXT /* Name of the presenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, artist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_records" (
  "chart_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the chart record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song on the chart */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart being tracked */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song for that week */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number in the year */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the song entered the chart */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the song exited the chart */,
  "peaks" INTEGER /* Number of times the song reached its peak position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_records_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_records_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist-genre link */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre associated with the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
